title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Congestive Heart Failure
description: Centella asiatica tinctures contains a range of properties that may help alleviate symptoms of congestive heart failure. The main constituents, including triterpenoids, saponins, and flavonoids, work together to improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation. This can help decrease blood pressure, reduce fluid buildup in the lungs, and increase the heart's efficiency in pumping blood.
